SiteLocation.title: Site Location
SiteLocation.description: A physical location or site for environmental tracking.

Employee.title: Employee
Employee.description: A centralized record for an employee or worker (Employee 360).

EmployeeAuthorization.title: Employee Authorization
EmployeeAuthorization.description: A permit or license authorizing an employee to operate specific machinery or perform tasks.

type.description: e.g., Forklift, Crane, PDP, First Aider

EmployeePPE.title: Employee PPE Issue
EmployeePPE.description: A record of Personal Protective Equipment issued to an employee.

ActionItem.title: Action Item
ActionItem.description: A specific action required to implement a control measure.

assessmentId.description: ID of the related Risk Assessment.

description.description: Details of the action to be taken.

assigneeId.description: User ID of the person responsible.

completedBy.description: User ID who completed the action.

RiskAssessment.title: Risk Assessment
RiskAssessment.description: A Hazard Identification and Risk Assessment (HIRA) record.

taskName.description: Name or description of the task being assessed

requiredPPE.description: List of required Personal Protective Equipment

requiredCompetencies.description: List of required training or competencies for the task

applicableLegislation.description: List of applicable laws, regulations, or standards

environmentalImpacts.description: List of environmental aspects and impacts

consultedStakeholders.description: List of workers, supervisors, or reps consulted

originalId.description: ID of the very first version of this assessment

previousId.description: ID of the immediately preceding version

reviewDate.description: Date when the assessment must be reviewed

reviewTriggers.description: Events that trigger an automatic review

authorId.description: UID of the user who created the assessment

reviewerId.description: UID of the user who reviewed the assessment

reviewerName.description: Name of the user who reviewed the assessment

approverId.description: UID of the user who approved the assessment

approverName.description: Name of the user who approved the assessment

status.description: Current status of the risk assessment

category.description: Category of the equipment, linked to Construction Regulations

qrCode.description: Unique identifier for QR code scanning

siteId.description: ID of the site where the asset is located

nextInspectionDate.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of next required inspection

authorId.description: UID of the user who created the record

EquipmentInspection.title: Equipment Inspection
EquipmentInspection.description: A record of inspection performed on equipment.

inspectorId.description: UID of the user who performed the inspection

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the inspection was performed

Incident.title: Incident
Incident.description: A record of a workplace incident, near-miss, or hazard observation.

status.description: Current status of the incident report

siteId.description: ID of the site where the incident occurred

reporterId.description: UID of the user who reported the incident

contractorId.description: ID of the contractor involved (if applicable)

contractorName.description: Name of the contractor involved (if applicable)

CAPA.title: Corrective and Preventative Action
CAPA.description: An action item generated to address an incident or audit finding.

createdById.description: UID of the user who created the CAPA

Document.title: Document
Document.description: A compliance document, policy, or procedure.

authorId.description: UID of the user who uploaded the document

Audit.title: Audit
Audit.description: A record of an internal or external audit.

title.description: Title or subject of the audit

siteId.description: ID of the site being audited

authorId.description: UID of the user who created the audit record

createdAt.description: When the audit record was created

LegalAppointment.title: Legal Appointment
LegalAppointment.description: A record of a statutory legal appointment (e.g., 16.2, SHE Rep).

role.description: The legal role (e.g., 16.2 Appointee, First Aider)

appointedBy.description: Name of the person making the appointment

authorId.description: UID of the user who created the record

contactEmail.description: Email address of the contact person

section37Signed.description: Whether the Section 37(2) agreement is signed

safetyPassportQr.description: Unique QR code ID for site access

siteId.description: ID of the site where the contractor is registered

authorId.description: UID of the user who registered the contractor

ContractorDocument.title: Contractor Document
ContractorDocument.description: A compliance document uploaded by a contractor.

contractorId.description: ID of the associated contractor company

workerId.description: ID of the associated worker (optional, for individual docs like medicals)

uploadedById.description: UID of the user who uploaded the document

ContractorWorker.title: Contractor Worker
ContractorWorker.description: An individual worker employed by a contractor.

safetyPassportQr.description: Unique QR ID for the worker.

location.description: Location where the work will be performed

assetId.description: ID of the asset being worked on (optional)

validFrom.description: Start time of the permit validity

validTo.description: End time of the permit validity

applicantId.description: UID of the user requesting the permit

approverId.description: UID of the user who approved the permit

contractorId.description: ID of the associated contractor company (optional)

contractorName.description: Name of the associated contractor company (optional)

workerIds.description: List of IDs of workers assigned to the permit

siteId.description: ID of the site where the permit is issued

LOTO.title: Lockout/Tagout Record
LOTO.description: A record of energy isolation for maintenance.

permitId.description: ID of the associated Permit to Work

assetId.description: ID of the asset being isolated

isolationPoints.description: List of points that were locked/tagged out

appliedById.description: UID of the user who applied the LOTO

appliedByName.description: Name of the user who applied the LOTO

removedById.description: UID of the user who removed the LOTO

TrainingRecord.title: Training Record
TrainingRecord.description: A record of employee or contractor training.

idNumber.description: ID or Passport number of the person trained

courseName.description: Name of the course (e.g., First Aid, Induction)

authorId.description: UID of the user who logged the record

ToolboxTalk.title: Toolbox Talk
ToolboxTalk.description: A record of a safety toolbox talk.

conductorName.description: Name of the person conducting the talk

authorId.description: UID of the user who logged the record

MedicalRecord.title: Medical Record
MedicalRecord.description: A highly restricted occupational health medical record.

nextDueDate.description: Date the next medical is due

authorId.description: UID of the occupational health practitioner

HygieneSurvey.title: Occupational Hygiene Survey
HygieneSurvey.description: A record of environmental/hygiene monitoring in a specific zone.

zoneName.description: Name of the area or zone

requiresMedicalSurveillance.description: Whether this zone requires employees to undergo specific medical surveillance

authorId.description: UID of the user who logged the survey
UID of the user who logged the manifest

EnvironmentalSpill.title: Environmental Spill
EnvironmentalSpill.description: Log of environmental spills and releases.

reportedToAuthorities.description: Has this been reported to environmental authorities?

authorId.description: UID of the user who logged the spill

EmergencyDrill.title: Emergency Drill
EmergencyDrill.description: Record of emergency evacuation or response drills.

durationMinutes.description: Duration of the drill in minutes

evaluatorName.description: Name of the person evaluating the drill

authorId.description: UID of the user who logged the drill

EmergencyEquipment.title: Emergency Equipment
EmergencyEquipment.description: Tracking of emergency equipment like extinguishers and first aid kits.

nextInspectionDate.description: When the equipment needs to be inspected next

authorId.description: UID of the user who logged the equipment

assessmentId.description: ID of the related Risk Assessment (optional linkage)

observerName.description: Name of the observer (can be anonymous)

interventionAction.description: Action taken to correct or reinforce the behavior

pointsAwarded.description: Gamification points awarded for this observation

authorId.description: UID of the user who logged the observation

RiskSignOff.title: Risk Sign-off
RiskSignOff.description: Digital sign-off for a risk assessment.

Notification.title: Notification
Notification.description: A system notification for compliance alerts or expiries.

userId.description: UID of the user to receive the notification

isRead.description: Whether the notification has been read

link.description: Optional internal link to the relevant module

DynamicRiskAssessment.title: Dynamic Risk Assessment (DRA)
DynamicRiskAssessment.description: On-the-spot risk assessment for changing environments.

isAnonymous.description: Whether the suggestion was submitted anonymously

authorId.description: UID of the user who logged the suggestion (if not fully anonymous at DB level)

ManagementOfChange.title: Management of Change (MoC)
ManagementOfChange.description: Tracks organizational, equipment, or process changes.

LegalRegister.title: Legal Register
LegalRegister.description: Tracks compliance with specific legislation and standards.

BowTieAnalysis.title: BowTie Analysis
BowTieAnalysis.description: Major Accident Hazard (MAH) BowTie risk analysis.

CoidaClaim.title: COIDA Claim & RTW
CoidaClaim.description: Compensation for Occupational Injuries and Diseases Act claims and Return to Work tracking.

StrategicRisk.title: Strategic Risk
StrategicRisk.description: A high-level enterprise risk that affects the organization's strategic objectives.

EsgMetric.title: ESG Metric
EsgMetric.description: Environmental, Social, and Governance metrics (e.g., Scope 1, 2, 3 emissions).

employees/{employeeId}.description: Stores all employee and worker records.

employees/{employeeId}/authorizations/{a.description: Stores authorizations and permits for a specific employee.

employees/{employeeId}/ppe/{ppeId}.description: Stores PPE issued to a specific employee.

equipment/{equipmentId}.description: Stores all plant and equipment records.

equipment_inspections/{inspectionId}.description: Stores all inspection records for equipment.

capas/{capaId}.description: Stores all Corrective and Preventative Actions.

contractor_documents/{documentId}.description: Stores all compliance documents for contractors.

permits/{permitId}.description: Stores all Permit to Work records.

training_records/{recordId}.description: Stores all training and competency records.

medical_records/{recordId}.description: Stores highly restricted occupational health medical records.

bowtie_analyses/{bowtieId}.description: Stores BowTie risk analyses for Major Accident Hazards.

coida_claims/{claimId}.description: Stores COIDA claims and Return to Work records.

action_items/{itemId}.description: Stores action items related to risk assessments.

risk_signoffs/{signOffId}.description: Stores digital sign-offs for risk assessments.

notifications/{notificationId}.description: Stores system notifications and compliance alerts.
